description: OG Penta Dragon ROM game state initialization timing after entering gameplay

methodology.boot_sequence: PentaDragonEnv.BOOT_SEQUENCE: WAIT 80f, DOWN, A, A, START, A
methodology.note: Step 0 = first frame after boot sequence completes and FFC1==1 sync. All steps are gameplay frames.

DCDD.meaning: HP main = 0 (never observed non-zero in 2000 steps)

FFBD.note: Already 5 at step 0 (set during boot sequence menu navigation)

FFC1.note: Already 1 at step 0 (sync_on waits for this)

DCBB.note: Starts at 255 (full timer). First countdown tick at step 319 (255->254)

FF43_SCX.note: SCX jumps from 0 to 12 at step 46 (room 5 scroll position). Stable at 12 after that.

FFDD.note: Initially 3, then fluctuates wildly (3,36,15,23,34,...). Likely NOT a simple lives counter - appears to be sprite/DMA related. Most common resting value is 23.

FFE5.note: Set to 5 at step 46, stable thereafter. Matches FFBD=5 (room 5).

FFCD.note: Set to 1 at step 46 simultaneously with FFE5, FFDD, and FF43.

FFBE.note: Sara form stays 0 (Witch) throughout all observed steps

FFBF.note: Boss flag stays 0 (no boss) throughout all observed steps

FFC0.note: Powerup state stays 0 (none) throughout all observed steps

FFD0.note: Stage flag stays 0 (normal) throughout all observed steps

DCDD.note: HP main never observed non-zero. May require taking damage to initialize, or uses a different mechanism.

critical_transition.description: Bulk initialization event at step 46 post-boot
critical_transition.note: Steps 1-45: all addresses except FFBD/FFC1/DCBB remain at 0. At step 46, the game engine completes level loading and sets scroll position, room2, and other state simultaneously. This is approximately 46 frames (~0.77 seconds) after FFC1=1 gameplay flag is set.

dcbb_countdown.tick_interval_approx: ~200 steps between first ticks, then accelerates
dcbb_countdown.note: DCBB decrements irregularly. First tick at step 319 (~5.3 sec), occasional multi-decrements (e.g., 251->246 at step 576).

ffdd_behavior.note: FFDD fluctuates constantly between many values (3,36,15,23,34,10,7,33,...). Most common resting value is 23 but it changes nearly every frame during active periods. This is NOT a simple lives counter - likely used as sprite count, DMA state, or similar frame-varying purpose.

raw_startup_without_boot.note: With boot_frames=0 and no boot sequence, all addresses start at 0. SCX reaches 8 at step 20 (title screen scroll). All game state addresses remain 0 until menu navigation occurs.
